review_reason: Phase 6 blocked: CanonicalIrreflexivity.lean requires complete rewrite (1360+ lines) to use Atom type. Recommend creating follow-up task 965 for proof rewrite.

completion_data.completion_summary: Introduced Atom type with freshness support across entire codebase (16 files modified). Phases 1-5 completed: Atom type definition, Formula/Semantics/ProofSystem/Examples updates. Phase 6 (proof rewrite) blocked due to complexity of existing 1360-line proof.
